# Agent Index / Agent 索引

## English

This page is the compact machine/human map for the wiki. Use it to route questions to the right page, route, source file, screenshot, or API family. Verify behavior against source and tests before editing code.

## 中文

本页是 Wiki 的紧凑机器/人类索引。用它把问题路由到正确页面、route、源码文件、截图或 API family。改代码前必须回源到源码和 tests 验证行为。

## Repository state / 仓库状态

- Fork: `hanzckernel/hermes-web-ui`
- Upstream: `EKKOLearnAI/hermes-web-ui`
- Upstream SHA: `0cb047c31e36da2d5e11eb7751c4fa6c48748df3`
- Fork main SHA after sync: `0cb047c31e36da2d5e11eb7751c4fa6c48748df3`
- Package version: `0.6.15`
- OpenAPI paths: `227`
- Client routes: `29`
- Languages: English + 中文

## Agent routing hints / Agent 路由提示

| Topic | English | 中文 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Chat/session | Start at Chat and Sessions; inspect `chat.ts` and server `run-chat`. | 从聊天与会话开始；检查 `chat.ts` 和 server `run-chat`。 |
| History/search | Do not assume Chat scope equals History scope. | 不要假设 Chat 范围等于 History 范围。 |
| Models/providers | Credential pools and custom providers are sensitive. | credential pool 和 custom provider 是敏感面。 |
| Group chat | Runtime/bridge readiness matters, not only @mention highlighting. | 关键是 runtime/bridge readiness，不只是 @mention 高亮。 |
| Kanban | Compare dashboard/canonical behavior before UI-only changes. | UI-only 改动前先比对 dashboard/canonical 行为。 |
| Cron/jobs | External delivery and scripts can have side effects. | 外发和脚本执行有副作用。 |
| Settings/channels | Avoid exposing tokens, env values, and private config. | 避免暴露 tokens、env 值和私人配置。 |

## Sensitive/mutating API families / 敏感或有副作用的 API family

| Family | English | 中文 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `/api/auth/**` | Auth, login, user/account state. | 认证、登录、用户/账号状态。 |
| `/api/hermes/config/**` | Hermes config/provider/credential writes. | Hermes 配置、provider、credential 写入。 |
| `/api/hermes/profiles/**` | Profile create/import/export/switch. | Profile 创建、导入、导出、切换。 |
| `/api/hermes/jobs/**` | Cron job creation/runs may execute or deliver externally. | Cron 创建/运行可能执行脚本或外发。 |
| `/api/hermes/files/**` | File operations can mutate workspaces. | 文件操作可能修改 workspace。 |
| Terminal WS | Interactive command execution surface. | 交互式命令执行面。 |
| Group chat / MCP / coding agents | Runtime dispatch and tool execution. | Runtime dispatch 和工具执行。 |
